steps.title: Identify the illustration
steps.content: The first sentence introduces energy transfer across trophic levels. The next sentence gives a concrete sequence: plants feed herbivores, herbivores feed carnivores and omnivores, and so on.

steps.title: Reject contrast transitions
steps.content: Choice A signals contrast, but the second sentence illustrates the first. Choice B signals a similar additional point, not an example. Choice C also signals contrast, which does not fit the explanatory sequence. The answer is D.
